text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Fri May  9 03:41:50 2014
New Revision: 353401
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353401
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353401/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/189294
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/math/p5-Math-SymbolicX-Statistics-Distributions/Makefile

Modified: head/math/p5-Math-SymbolicX-Statistics-Distributions/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/math/p5-Math-SymbolicX-Statistics-Distributions/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:41:46 2014	(r353400)
+++ head/math/p5-Math-SymbolicX-Statistics-Distributions/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:41:50 2014	(r353401)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	math perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Statistical distributions
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Math-Symbolic>=0:${PORTSDIR}/math/p5-Math-Symbolic \
 		p5-Math-SymbolicX-ParserExtensionFactory>=0:${PORTSDIR}/math/p5-Math-SymbolicX-ParserExtensionFactory
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
